message:
fix(tests): resolve borrow-checker conflict in orchestration context lifecycle test and update bead tracker

orchestration_context_contract_integration.rs:
- Extracted budget_ms into a local variable before passing it to
  consume_budget(), avoiding a simultaneous immutable borrow (field
  read) and mutable borrow (function parameter) of the same context
  struct. This fixes a compile error introduced by stricter
  borrow-checker enforcement in recent Rust editions.
- Removed unused imports (ContentHash, DerivationEvent, SCHEMA_VERSION,
  COMPONENT) to satisfy dead-code warnings.

.beads/issues.jsonl: updated bead status tracking entries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
